name: signdocs-brasil
description: SignDocs Brasil e-signature tools for AI agents — create signing sessions, manage multi-signer envelopes, verify documents, and more, over the hosted SignDocs MCP endpoint.

endpoint_url.title: MCP endpoint URL
endpoint_url.description: SignDocs MCP endpoint. Default is homologação (HML/sandbox). For production use https://mcp.signdocs.com.br/mcp

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: OAuth2 client ID from app.signdocs.com.br → API

client_secret.title: Client Secret
client_secret.description: OAuth2 client secret from app.signdocs.com.br → API
